sentences.target: Ich war zuletzt im Januar dort.

translations.de: Ich war zuletzt im Januar dort.
translations.en: I was there last in January.
translations.es: La última vez que estuve allí fue en enero.
translations.fr: La dernière fois que j'y suis allé, c'était en janvier.
translations.it: L'ultima volta che ero lì era gennaio.
translations.ru: В последний раз я был там в январе.
translations.pt: A última vez que estive lá foi em janeiro.
translations.he: הפעם האחרונה שהייתי שם הייתה בינואר.
translations.tr: En son oraya Ocak ayında gittim.
translations.vi: Lần cuối tôi đến đó là vào tháng Một.
translations.ar: آخر مرة كنت هناك كانت في يناير.
translations.nl: De laatste keer dat ik daar was, was in januari.
translations.uk: Востаннє я був там у січні.
translations.hi: मैं वहाँ आख़िरी बार जनवरी में था.
translations.pl: Ostatni raz byłem tam w styczniu.
translations.el: Τελευταία φορά που ήμουν εκεί ήταν τον Ιανουάριο.
translations.nb: Sist jeg var der, var i januar.
translations.id: Terakhir kali saya ke sana bulan Januari.
translations.sv: Senast jag var där var i januari.
translations.ro: Ultima dată când am fost acolo a fost în ianuarie.
translations.cs: Naposledy jsem tam byl v lednu.
translations.da: Sidst jeg var der, var i januar.
translations.ja: 最後にそこに行ったのは1月でした。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (preterite of 'sein'); main predicate expressing a past state.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; indicates the most recent time of the event.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a temporal prepositional phrase and governs dative.
Proper noun (month); object of the preposition 'im', functioning as a time expression (dative singular).
Locative adverb indicating place; predicative complement to 'war'.

sentences.target: Wir haben uns zuletzt im Park gesehen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ʊns tsuˈlɛtst ɪm paʁk ɡəˈzeːən/

translations.de: Wir haben uns zuletzt im Park gesehen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ʊns tsuˈlɛtst ɪm paʁk ɡəˈzeːən/
translations.en: We last saw each other in the park.
translations.es: La última vez que nos vimos fue en el parque.
translations.fr: La dernière fois qu'on s'est vus, c'était au parc.
translations.it: L'ultima volta che ci siamo visti è stata al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们最后一次见面是在公园。
translations.yue: 我哋最後一次見面喺公園。
translations.ru: В последний раз мы встретились в парке.
translations.pt: A última vez que nos vimos foi no parque.
translations.vi: Lần cuối chúng ta gặp nhau là ở công viên.
translations.ar: آخر مرة التقينا كانت في الحديقة.
translations.nl: De laatste keer dat we elkaar zagen was in het park.
translations.hi: हम आख़िरी बार पार्क में मिले थे.
translations.pl: Ostatni raz widzieliśmy się w parku.
translations.el: Τελευταία φορά που συναντηθήκαμε ήταν στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Sist vi møttes var i parken.
translations.id: Terakhir kali kita bertemu di taman.
translations.sv: Senast vi så var i parken.
translations.ro: Ultima dată când ne-am văzut a fost în parc.
translations.cs: Naposledy jsme se viděli v parku.
translations.da: Sidst vi så hinanden, var i parken.
translations.ja: 最後に会ったのは公園でした。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 1st person plural); forms the present perfect with 'gesehen'.
Reflexive/object pronoun, 1st person plural (accusative/dative depending on analysis); coreferential with the subject; complements 'gesehen' (reciprocal reading possible).
Temporal adverb modifying the event; indicates the most recent occasion.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a locative prepositional phrase and governs dative.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative singular); denotes location.
Past participle of the lexical verb; head of the perfect construction with 'haben'; expresses the seeing event.

translations.en: He arrived last at the office.
translations.es: Fue el último en llegar a la oficina.
translations.fr: Il est arrivé au bureau en dernier.
translations.it: È arrivato in ufficio per ultimo.
translations.yue: 佢係最後一個到公司嘅。
translations.ru: Он пришёл в офис самым последним.
translations.pt: Ele foi o último a chegar ao escritório.
translations.vi: Anh ấy là người đến văn phòng sau cùng.
translations.ar: كان آخر من وصل إلى المكتب.
translations.nl: Hij kwam als laatste op kantoor aan.
translations.hi: वह दफ़्तर में सबसे आख़िर में पहुँचा.
translations.pl: On przyszedł do biura jako ostatni.
translations.id: Dia tiba di kantor paling akhir.
translations.ro: El a ajuns ultimul la birou.
translations.ja: 彼は会社に最後に来ました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (preterite); intransitive main predicate indicating movement/arrival.
Temporal adverb modifying 'kam'; indicates the last/most recent instance.
Preposition (contraction of 'in das'); introduces a directional PP; governs accusative for motion towards.
Common noun; object of 'ins' (accusative singular); denotes destination.

translations.fr: Je nettoie la cuisine en dernier.
translations.ru: Я убираю кухню в последнюю очередь.
translations.pt: Eu limpo a cozinha por último.
translations.nl: Ik maak de keuken als laatste schoon.
translations.uk: Я прибираю кухню в останню чергу.
translations.hi: मैं रसोई सबसे अंत में साफ करता हूँ.
translations.da: Jeg gør køkkenet rent til sidst.
translations.ja: キッチンは最後に掃除します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present, 1st person singular); transitive predicate taking a direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying 'putze'; indicates order (done last) or most recent occurrence depending on context.
Definite article, feminine accusative; determiner for 'Küche'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'putze' (accusative singular).
